name: AKA
overview: Azad, a quiet courier with a painful past, kills a criminal by accident and becomes an online hero. Wanting more praise, he keeps targeting bad people. As his actions grow bolder, people compare him to Aka — a mysterious figure from the past known for punishing the guilty.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - AKA (আকা) | Afran Nisho | Vicky Zahed | 4 SEP | hoichoi
